subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who is sanctified above all names and exalted beyond whatsoever is mentioned in creation, Who when He speaketh, all things give voice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تقدس عن الاسماء و تنزه عما ذکر فی الانشاء الذی اذا نطق نطقت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @business; financial; property matters, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
